basics.name: Md. Rashed
basics.label: Researcher in AI, Computer Vision & Medical Imaging
basics.summary: I received my B.Sc. (Engr.) in Information and Communication Engineering from Pabna University of Science and Technology (PUST). I have actively engaged in research, academic, and innovation activities, including government-funded projects. My research interests include Biomedical Image Processing, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, and IoT. I am currently seeking a Research Associate or academic position to contribute to both education and impactful research.

highlights: Conduct research in medical imaging and AI
Develop deep learning models for segmentation and detection
